feature: pii-config: PII Redactor Rules UI over existing redact.go (regex rules) + presidio.go (connector)
apiContract:
{
  "PII Rule Model": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "name": "string (user-friendly name)",
    "description": "string (optional)",
    "type": "enum: 'regex' | 'presidio'",
    "enabled": "boolean (enable/disable without deletion)",
    "scope": "enum: 'global' (all VKs) | 'virtual_key' (specific VK) | 'provider' (optional future)",
    "scope_id": "string (optional, VK ID when scope='virtual_key')",
    "regex_pattern": "string (when type='regex', required)",
    "regex_replacement": "string (when type='regex', default: '[REDACTED]')",
    "presidio_entity_type": "string (when type='presidio', e.g. 'PERSON', 'EMAIL')",
    "presidio_score_threshold": "float64 (when type='presidio', 0-1, default: 0.5)",
    "order": "int (execution order, lower runs first)",
    "created_at": "timestamp",
    "updated_at": "timestamp"
  },
  "CRUD Endpoints": {
    "GET /api/governance/pii-rules": "List with pagination, scope filtering, search by name",
    "POST /api/governance/pii-rules": "Create new rule",
    "GET /api/governance/pii-rules/{id}": "Fetch single rule",
    "PUT /api/governance/pii-rules/{id}": "Update rule (name, description, enabled, order, pattern/entity config)",
    "DELETE /api/governance/pii-rules/{id}": "Soft or hard delete",
    "POST /api/governance/pii-rules/{id}/test": "Test a regex pattern against sample text (POST with {text: string})"
  }
}
steps: Create TablePIIRule model in /framework/configstore/tables/pii_rule.go with GORM tags; use gorm.io/gorm for CASCADE, include discriminator fields for regex (pattern, replacement) vs presidio (entity_type, score_threshold)

Add migration in migrations.go: register in configstoreMigrationSteps array, create migrationAddPIIRulesTable() function following migrationAddVirtualKeyMCPConfigsTable pattern at /framework/configstore/migrations.go:~285

Implement configstore methods in new file store_pii_rules.go (mirror VirtualKey patterns): CreatePIIRule, GetPIIRule, GetPIIRules, UpdatePIIRule, DeletePIIRule, ListPIIRules—call h.governanceManager.ReloadPIIRules(ctx) after mutations

Wire govenanceManager callback: add ReloadPIIRules and RemovePIIRule to GovernanceManager interface in /transports/bifrost-http/handlers/governance.go:46-62, implement in the in-memory governance data struct

Add HTTP CRUD handlers in /transports/bifrost-http/handlers/governance.go following createVirtualKey pattern (1238+): createPIIRule, getPIIRules, getPIIRule, updatePIIRule, deletePIIRule, with request/response DTOs, validation, error handling
Register routes in GovernanceHandler.RegisterRoutes() at /transports/bifrost-http/handlers/governance.go:963 under new 'PII Rules CRUD' section before line 1025
Add TypeScript types in /ui/lib/types/piiRules.ts (mirror governance.ts structure): PIIRule, CreatePIIRuleRequest, UpdatePIIRuleRequest, GetPIIRulesResponse, GetPIIRulesParams

Create RTK query API slice in /ui/lib/store/apis/piiRulesApi.ts extending baseApi with endpoints: getPIIRules (query), createPIIRule, updatePIIRule, deletePIIRule (mutations), with pessimistic cache updates
Create frontend page at /ui/app/workspace/pii-redactor/rules/page.tsx with useGetPIIRulesQuery hook (pagination, filtering by scope)
Create table component at /ui/app/workspace/pii-redactor/rules/views/piiRulesTable.tsx with columns: name, type (badge: regex|presidio), pattern/entity-type preview, enabled toggle, order, actions
Create sheet component (create/edit) at /ui/app/workspace/pii-redactor/rules/views/piiRuleSheet.tsx with conditional fields based on type discriminator, include regex test button

Update loopbackguard plugin in /plugins/loopbackguard/main.go: add LoadPIIRules() method to Plugin struct that fetches rules from configstore, dynamically builds Redactor + PresidioClient from DB rules instead of hardcoded defaults
Call LoadPIIRules in PreRequestHook after governance manager ReloadPIIRules (hook pattern: governanceManager broadcasts change → plugin reloads rules in-memory for next request)
Replace stub at /ui/app/_fallbacks/enterprise/components/pii-redactor/piiRedactorRulesView.tsx to render the actual PiiRedactorRulesPage component instead of ContactUsView
risks:
[
  "Regex injection/DoS: Validate regex patterns with timeout, cache compiled regexes, reject overly complex patterns (max length 1000 chars, max groups limit)",
  "Presidio connector availability: Plugin already has fail-open semantics but ensure rules gracefully handle missing Presidio service (test with unavailable endpoint)",
  "Rule ordering conflicts: Multiple rules matching same text—execution order matters; add UI warning when regex patterns overlap, document first-match-wins semantics",
  "Performance degradation: Per-request rule evaluation on every message; cache compiled regexes in Plugin, use sync.Pool for rune slices in maskEntities (avoid alloc churn)",
  "Scope isolation: VK-scoped rules must not leak to other VKs; verify ScopeID matching in the plugin's rule-selection logic (getApplicableRules(scopeID))",
  "Migration safety: Test on live data (large msg volumes) to ensure rule compilation does not block startup; if Presidio config fails, plugin should not crash on init",
  "Backward compat: Old config files reference hardcoded DefaultPIIRules—keep default rules in DB seed or lazy-init if no rules exist (graceful degradation)"
]

loopbackguardWiring:
{
  "Plugin Initialization": "loopbackguard.Plugin is instantiated in bifrost-http/server/plugins.go's loadBuiltinPlugin() or as custom plugin; config may come from DB or static config",
  "Rule Loading Hook": "Add GovernanceManager callback ReloadPIIRules(ctx) → Plugin.LoadPIIRules() loads all enabled rules from configstore, rebuilds Redactor (regex) and PresidioClient(entity) in-memory",
  "Execution Path": "BifrostRequest → PreRequestHook → p.applyTransformers (PresidioClient) → p.redactor (Redactor) for message text mutation before provider call",
  "Scope Filtering": "In Plugin.LoadPIIRules(), filter rules by scope (global + VK-scoped rules for this VK's ID extracted from request context); merge into ordered rule list",
  "Config Broadcast": "When rule CRUD mutation completes in HTTP handler, call governanceManager.ReloadPIIRules(ctx) to notify plugin; plugin reloads for next request (eventual consistency, not strict)"
}
